untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'implied volatility percentile' readings which is not available in the allowed indicator list. The closest proxy available is india_vix (volatility index), but this is a volatility level, not a percentile ranking. The signal specifically requires percentile-ranked IV data (10th, 50th, 90th percentile thresholds) which cannot be accurately replicated using standard price/volume indicators. A proper implementation would require an IV_percentile or similar indicator.
translation_notes: Attempted substitution using india_vix as volatility proxy, but this is a conceptual workaround only. The original signal logic (cheap/expensive IV percentile) cannot be faithfully translated without an explicit implied volatility percentile indicator. Entry conditions map to volatility extremes, exit conditions map to mean reversion toward the median.
